summary: High‑energy show with a magical “Eyes of the World” intro captured on a clean soundboard tape
review: Fans rave about the dynamic, rare‑form performance – from the unforgettable Eyes of the World intro to the overall vibe that made the night feel legendary. The recording (a soundboard source) is praised for its clarity and listening pleasure, with no notable technical flaws mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 4‑5 stars and highlighted both an outstanding performance and a clean recording; the weighted average leans heavily toward a superb show with good technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific complaints – reviewers note the recording’s vibe and overall listenability, implying clear sound without drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a ‘dynamic duo’ night with rare form and high energy, giving fans a sense that the set flowed exceptionally well.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as cool onstage, chatting on a pay phone; reviewers note his lingering fire despite personal struggles.
band_member_comments.Phil: Seen backstage rolling a tank‑mask prop and commenting “it sounds unbelievable,” indicating enthusiasm and involvement.
